description: paginate the local screenpipe /search API over a time window into a normalized timeline JSON
rules: read-only — only GETs the local screenpipe /search endpoint on loopback
bounded: hard ceiling of 10000 pages so the loop cannot spin forever
normalizes each event to {ts, app, window_title, text, content_type}
SCREENPIPE_TOKEN bearer-auths the request when set; SCREENPIPE_URL defaults to http://localhost:3030
degrades gracefully — writes a well-formed empty timeline if the daemon is unreachable
timeline written to record_store as timeline.json
usage: Set START and END (ISO times). Optional: SCREENPIPE_URL, SCREENPIPE_TOKEN. Output: timeline.json.
limitation: Has no alternate data source: a real timeline requires the screenpipe daemon running on loopback. Offline it yields an empty timeline.
